notes: Source is the official Panasonic Global pro-av product specification page. Model AW-UE150W/K (W=white, K=black variants). The AW-UE150A is a newer revision (AW=white, AK=black) with the same I/O layout. The DC 12V IN uses a 4-pin XLR connector (XLR4) which is not in the controlled connector list; xlr3 was used as the closest available. PoE++ power arrives via the LAN (RJ-45) port and is noted there rather than as a separate port. The RS-422 port uses an RJ-45 physical connector but carries RS-422 serial protocol — not Ethernet. No USB port is present on this model.

ports.name: G/L IN
ports.note: Genlock input; accepts Black Burst Sync (BBS) and tri-level sync

ports.name: Optical Fiber
ports.note: SFP+ standard slot for optional fiber output module

ports.name: LAN
ports.note: 100BASE-TX / 1000BASE-T; carries IP video streaming, IP camera control, and PoE++ power input (IEEE802.3bt, 42–57 V DC)

ports.name: RS-422 CONTROL IN
ports.note: RS-422 serial control over RJ-45 connector; not a standard RJ-45 network port

ports.name: MIC/LINE IN
ports.note: Stereo mini jack (3.5mm); selectable plug-in power; AAC audio compatible (IP output only)

ports.name: DC 12V IN
ports.note: 4-pin XLR (XLR4) DC input; accepts 10.8–13.2 V DC at 4.0 A.
